# technitium_blocked_zones (Data Source)

Lists all blocked zones on a Technitium DNS Server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "technitium_blocked_zones" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `zones` (Attributes List) List of blocked zones. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--zones))

<a id="nestedatt--zones"></a>
### Nested Schema for `zones`

Read-Only:

- `domain` (String) The domain name of the blocked zone.
